title: Risk Analyst
description: Johnson & Johnson is one of the world's most trusted healthcare companies, serving 1.3 billion people across pharmaceutical, medical device, and consumer health. We're seeking talented professionals to support our risk management and operational excellence initiatives.
responsibilities: Conduct quantitative risk assessments for supply chain and operations across global facilities
Develop risk mitigation strategies and monitor implementation effectiveness
Compile compliance reports for regulatory bodies and internal stakeholders
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to identify emerging risk exposures
Maintain risk documentation and lead annual risk assessments
Support business continuity planning and disaster recovery protocols

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Business, Finance, Economics, or related field
requirements.experience_years: 2-5 years of risk management, operations, or business analysis experience

benefits: Paid vacation, holidays, and personal days
